---
title: "Lecture Slides"
---

One deck per chapter, built from the instructor's manual's teaching maps
and Learning Outcome Statements. Decks are faithful to the book: every
slide's claims trace to a chapter section or a manual LOS guide.

| Chapter | Deck | Status |
|---|---|---|
| 1. Alternative Assets and the Limits of Classical Financial Engineering | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch01_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 2–17 | — | In production |
